item.title: Fiji-Airways
item.description: A new codeshare partnership between Fiji Airways and Canada's WestJet will introduce three weekly direct flights between Nadi and Vancouver from the 18th of next month, i

item.title: Cancer-Society
item.description: Cancer survivor Warwick Marlow is urging people to seek medical help early if they notice any signs of illness. While sharing his personal battle with cancer during the l

item.title: Consumer-Council
item.description: The Consumer Council of Fiji has welcomed the landmark judgement delivered by the High Courtin Suva, which dismissed a long-running lawsuit brought by Hansons Supermarket
item.content:encoded: The Consumer Council of Fiji has welcomed the landmark judgement delivered by the High Courtin Suva, which dismissed a long-running lawsuit brought by Hansons Supermarket
